name: the namespace-axis-binding.yaml file declares markdown linguist alias entries for the three jurisdictional-namespace additions from C-25
command: grep -q '^  european-union: .*markdown' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/namespace-axis-binding.yaml" && grep -q '^  finance-industry: .*markdown' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/namespace-axis-binding.yaml" && grep -q '^  industry-self-regulatory: .*markdown' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/namespace-axis-binding.yaml" && echo axis-binding-jurisdictional-complete 1>&2
